old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-3k6w","title":"Fix gateway forwarding to prefer RPL local mesh before TUN/Yggdrasil","description":"Per spec/05-routing.md:7.2 and appendix-border-router, BR must classify incoming mesh IPv6 packets: if dst in RPL routes (local mesh), forward downward via RPL source routing or Node router; else inject to TUN (Yggdrasil/kernel). Current forward_mesh_to_upstream unconditionally sends all to TUN (see lichend.rs:350, gateway.rs:34). Update Gateway to integrate Router/RplNode or use routes map for classification. Add mesh_to_mesh forward path that re-compresses and queues to SLIP/sim TX. Update run_sim/run_serial to handle both paths. Update tests. 3 codereview passes required before closing ydtk.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-07-22T15:26:11.085879799Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T15:26:11.085879799Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-3k6w","title":"Fix gateway forwarding to prefer RPL local mesh before TUN/Yggdrasil","description":"Per spec/05-routing.md:7.2 and appendix-border-router, BR must classify incoming mesh IPv6 packets: if dst in RPL routes (local mesh), forward downward via RPL source routing or Node router; else inject to TUN (Yggdrasil/kernel). Current forward_mesh_to_upstream unconditionally sends all to TUN (see lichend.rs:350, gateway.rs:34). Update Gateway to integrate Router/RplNode or use routes map for classification. Add mesh_to_mesh forward path that re-compresses and queues to SLIP/sim TX. Update run_sim/run_serial to handle both paths. Update tests. 3 codereview passes required before closing ydtk.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"ec2-user","created_at":"2026-07-22T15:26:11.085879799Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T15:29:33.318079538Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T15:29:33.318079538Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T15:34:33.318079538Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T15:29:33.318079538Z","labels":["defer-external"]}

new_value: Gateway forwarding fixed to prefer RPL local mesh (is_local_mesh + mesh_to_mesh path) before TUN/Yggdrasil per spec/05-routing.md:7.2 and appendix. Integrated RplNode in Gateway, updated forward_mesh_to_upstream in lichend.rs:457, added mesh_to_mesh. Tests pass, codereview passes done via children. Commit 37cf7c5dc
